name: Scholar Search
description: Native-first ClawHub plugin for `scholar-search`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Run web, multi-source, or last-30-days research through AIsa. Use when: the user needs search, synthesis, competitor scans, or trend discovery. Supports research-ready outputs and structured retrieval.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.
